violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (butter) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

At the time of inspection, ROP lobster was thawing with package intact. Reduced oxygen packaging fish that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment. Temperature was observed at 35 degrees Fahrenheit, lobster was taken out of package at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Working containers of spices at the bar are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the stove, ansul system, utensil holder have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The wall in the ware washing area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair, inspector observed hole with black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025

Protective shielding is not provided for a light above the grill. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Please email inspector proof of revised menu. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
Utensils were observed stored in sanitizer between uses. In-use utensils were removed from container and cleaned during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The cutting boards on the grill prep unit are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Ice machine was taken out of service and must not be used until it is cleaned. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Orzo was observed held at 68 degrees Fahrenheit in an ice bath on table in the front. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, orzo had been placed in the ice bath about 2 hours prior to inspection. Orzo was relocated to the walk-in cooler to cool. Establishment must discontinue using ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Milk and half & half were observed held at 47-50 degrees Fahrenheit in the mini refrigerator. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, milk and half & half had been in there for a long time. Both were voluntarily disposed of at time of inspection (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Mini refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Mini refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The cutting board on the grill prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (potato dicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

Food was observed held at 43-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the unit overnight. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 43 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Per person in charge, repair services will be scheduled. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) tuna was observed thawed in the prep unit with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. Tuna was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Tuna was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023

The floors and walls under the 3-bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/22/2023
Menus are lacking an allergy statement notifying customers of their obligation to notify staff if they have a food allergy. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Shellfish tags are not stored in chronological order and did not have the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag. Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was taken out of service during time of inspection and must not be used until it is repaired. Repair services came during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and French fry cutter) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine chute) were observed with an accumulation of black debris and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and an employee emptied and cleaned the ice machine at time of inspection. An employee was sent out to get bagged ice during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Multiple containers of food (see temperature observations) were observed held at 51-52 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit #1. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge food had been in the prep unit since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The prep unit was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

Steak was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit #3. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, steak had been in the prep unit since the day prior. Steak was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The door to the outside, located in the restroom area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
French fries were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Multiple containers of food were observed uncovered in refrigeration units. Food must be covered to prevent contamination during storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023

The floors (especially under and behind equipment) and walls (especially behind the dishwasher and 3-bay sink) throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
